events.note: net.exe used to create the account — Sysmon catches the LOLBin execution
Account added to Administrators — escalation to local admin

mutation_hints.objective: Create a hidden backdoor local admin account for persistent access
detection_anchors: Field match: Image=net.exe → use C:\Windows\System32\net1.exe (identical behavior; some rules only match net.exe not net1.exe) or C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe with New-LocalUser cmdlet
Field match: CommandLine contains 'net user' and '/add' → PowerShell syntax: New-LocalUser -Name x -Password (ConvertTo-SecureString 'pw' -AsPlainText -Force) -FullName '' -Description ''
Field match: GroupName=Administrators → use Backup Operators or Remote Desktop Users (also elevated but less commonly alerted on; Backup Operators can read all files and restore system state)
Field match: IntegrityLevel=High → reduce to Medium if UAC was already bypassed or account created via scheduled task at SYSTEM
Field: ParentImage=cmd.exe → change to powershell.exe, explorer.exe, or mmc.exe (management console) as the account-creation parent
Field: TargetUserName → use a name that matches existing service account patterns (svc_update_XX, healthsvc, etc.) to blend with legitimate accounts
Field: SamAccountName → must match TargetUserName; use same value as TargetUserName override
